creator: rsc@merit.edu
text:
I'm afraid I got the version # wrong when I submitted this. My
patch applies to the current arla-0.35.5_2 port, not to 0.34.6


Should I re-submit the problem report?


> originally from: <petef@FreeBSD.org>
> subject: Re: ports/28102: Recent changes to 4.3-STABLE break arla-0.34.6
> date: Mon, 17 Dec 2001 20:50:59 -0800
> --------
>Synopsis: Recent changes to 4.3-STABLE break arla-0.34.6
>
>State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
>State-Changed-By: petef
>State-Changed-When: Mon Dec 17 20:49:01 PST 2001
>State-Changed-Why: 
>The arla port is now at version 0.35.5, and should fix this problem.
>
>http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=28102
